reviews.review_description: So far I have loved playing this game is not so jolty as to make you super sick but the actual fights have a very fast pace I'm glad to see the devs are constantly improving the game I've been playing the last three days and everyday I'm seeing new tweaks to the game
My new crush since Star Wars, Tales from Galaxy's Edge!
Warning ⚠️  this may break your headset

developer_response.body: Hi Zac0ry, would you care to elaborate on this please? Did you experience some kind of issue? We see 0 crash issues from our side. We don't believe it's technically possible for an app to break a headset so this may be coincidental to something else but we'd be happy to investigate if you are able to provide more information.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game!!   I can really see all the hard work you guys are putting in this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! This means a lot to us :)

reviews.review_title: Do not play or download this game
reviews.review_description: While I was downloading an update for this game, the game got stuck with the installation icon on it. Therefore I can't remove it uninstall it or move on, Therefore I can't install or update games I already have if your thinking about playing this game don't!!!!

developer_response.body: General headset issue and not something under our control or related to the game.

reviews.review_title: This is going to be big
reviews.review_description:
User functionality: One of the main things I like about this game is the ability to switch back and forth on the choice of controls mid-game.  I don’t have to log out and redo settings, it’s all there in the cockpit. The game also runs very smooth.

User Experience: This layout is AWESOME. The moment I got into the cockpit it was Dogfight time in space for sure! Be advised to make sure you get a good feel for ALL of the control options so that you don’t get motion sick. In addition, be sure to go through the tutorial to make sure you know all the assets that you have around you during your match. That was one of the major things I didn’t see my competitors doing and picked them off with no problems. Play the game to find out what I’m talking about. 

This game has so much potential to expand when it comes to user customization, squadrons, patches, helmet designs - endless opportunities! 

In other words, yeah, I like it, and it’s worth a try! And with that Top Gun sequel coming out why not get a feel for the need for speed :)

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying yourself and you are so right about the tutorial! :)

reviews.review_description:
Squadron One Deathmatch is a full blow Dogfighting space simulator in Virtual Reality. It takes a few minutes to get used to the controls but I had a blast playing it!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YdUTU0PeKeg

When I launched the game I was greeted with one of the best looking VR menus I have ever had the pleasure of viewing. Colorful, but not loud. Everything is easy to find, and the texture quality is a high as possible for the Quest, which is a PS2 strapped to your face. I select basic training and complete one of the most well designed tutorials I have ever played. I finish the tutorial, kill a few Ai fighters, and return to the menu. I find one available lobby and join it. I play a single round and have a lot of fun trying (and failing) to shoot anyone. As it turns out I happened to join the lobby that contained both the lead developer and the best player. No wonder I couldn't kill anyone. But they were insanely nice. And I mean it. These two people were some of the nicest folks I have ever met while playing a VR game. We spoke about the development, coming features, new ships, and other such possible things to come. Before the lead developer left, he told me to try out the chill mode, which I did. It was strangely relaxing, just sitting in the cockpit and listening to the great music. I did run into some frame drops while in the center of the free roam area, but it wasn't too bad. One complaint I do have is that the arcade controls are not quite responsive enough, leading to some inadvertent crashes into asteroids and such. This is not much of an issue at the moment, because crashing does not damage your ship. The future plan is to make it so, however, so I do think that they should tweak the controls just slightly. Otherwise, a phenomenal game that I do plan on playing again.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this very detailed review and the feedback contained in it. It makes the hard work worth it and inspires us to continue making the best game we can :)

reviews.review_description:
This is the space flight dog fight game you have been looking for…and it’s free…..

Free….

Did I say free?

developer_response.body: So... it is free? :) Glad you are enjoying it, hope to meet up in game some time.

reviews.review_description: if you like to dogfight you will love this game.

developer_response.body: It really is all about the dogfighting! Thanks for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: I've recently downloaded this through applab/ oculus store and it's day two..absolutely hooked into this . Unbelievably immersive gameplay and fantastic game mechanics / physics! . The graphics are second to none and everything is extremely well designed . Not had this much fun and catharsis since first getting the meta quest 2 . So excited to see what's coming next for this , honestly can't believe this game is just starting out given how well designed and developed . Absolutely 5 stars !!!!!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts! Glad you are having fun.

reviews.review_description: This gorgeous game is FREE!!! It looks so good. Even the menus are eyepopingly crisp. It is updated daily, has 3 tournaments a day, and even single player missions. Check out my single player mission video. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xA18wsZTPzs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and putting together the video.

reviews.review_description: Ever wanted to dog fight in space ships like Star Wars? This is it! You can catch the developers in there as well and take extremely well to ideas on how to improve the gameplay. Overall a really great game to play with friends
I downloaded this app and I want to go play it just no mic required and then it keeps saying parental controls. There’s no parental controls. I’m an adult and the game just didn’t not load.

developer_response.body: Thank you for reporting this and the 1 star review. It sounds like you have parental controls setup on your headset for the microphone feature which is not something we have any control over. We hope you will come back and amend your review once you've worked out your settings!

reviews.review_description:
As a fan of space flight simulators, I was excited to try out Squadron 1 on my Oculus Quest 2. The game offers a variety of game modes, including multiplayer deathmatch, missions, practice against AI, basic training, and chill mode. The controls were easy to pick up, and I appreciated the option to use manual controls or the controller thumbsticks.

One issue I encountered was with the joystick controls in arcade/controller mode. There seemed to be a deadzone in the corners, which resulted in slow aim movement and made it difficult to chase down enemies. However, the headtracking weapon aiming was a cool feature and helped offset the control issues.

Overall, I really enjoyed Squadron 1. The graphics were beautiful and the gameplay was smooth and immersive. The deathmatch mode was especially fun and gave me Star Wars vibes. I also appreciated the variety of game modes, including the option to relax and listen to music in Free Roam mode. The developers are also regularly adding new features, which is a nice touch.

I would definitely recommend Squadron 1 to other space flight simulator fans. It's a great, free game with a lot of potential. The only downside is that the multiplayer aspect was a little confusing for me to figure out, but I'm sure it's just a learning curve on my part. Overall, a great game and definitely worth checking out.

—

The Oculus Quest 2 has a wide range of single player games, as well as many co-op multiplayer games that can be enjoyed with friends and loved ones, even if you're not in the same location. 

VR technology brings people together in a unique and exciting way.

If you want to purchase additional headsets for family members, loved ones, or friends, you can use the €30 credit available through the coupon code link (https://www.oculus.com/referrals/link/xinwix/) to get a discount.

This credit can be used to purchase at least 1-3 games or co-op games to get started, making it a great opportunity to share the virtual reality experienc
This game has some amazing potential, but currently the controls make it hard to play at lease, for me. If you guys could fix the controls a bit, and after a few updates, this game will be great!

developer_response.body: Hi Ram, we made it that you have 3 types of controls, from what you would expect when playing on a console controller, flight sim users and also full VR grabbable controls, we spent a lot of time creating all types of controls for all users.

reviews.review_title: Dogfight with your buds in space!
reviews.review_description: Grab some of your friends and buckle up! Prepare to get launched out of a tube like in Battlestar Galactica to do battle. Who will win? Collect power-ups and outwit your friends to win the crown and celebrate with fireworks. This game is a lot of fun. You can even play it single player to practice up.
Very good game with three ways to control the device, although keeping control of it can be a bit challenging.
I lived this game it has so much potential and it gives me star wars vibes

But I cannot get past the initial loading screen where you can turn on or off the audio recording. It won’t let me select any option to move forward. I’ll adjust review if I ever get a chance to go in and actually play it.

developer_response.body: Very sorry about this. A recent change caused an issue for new installations. We have just put out a new release which addresses this. Give it a go! We look forward to seeing you in game.
